headerDisplay: TTLock Platform. You can configure your client, user credentials and optional visibility filters below.
footerDisplay: Use hideLocks to hide one or more locks. You can enter a lock alias, lock ID, lock name or MAC address. Separate multiple values with commas, semicolons or line breaks.

password.title: TTLock Password (MD5)
password.description: MD5 hash of your TTLock account password.

batteryLowLevel.title: Low battery threshold (%)
batteryLowLevel.description: Battery percentage at or below which HomeKit shows a low battery warning.

maximumApiRetry.title: Maximum API retries
maximumApiRetry.description: Maximum number of attempts per TTLock API request.

requestTimeoutMs.title: Request timeout (ms)
requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for TTLock API requests.

apiRetryIntervalMs.title: Delay between retries (ms)
apiRetryIntervalMs.description: Delay between TTLock network retry attempts.

postActionRefreshDelayMs.title: Refresh delay after lock/unlock (ms)
postActionRefreshDelayMs.description: Delay before the second API request that re-reads the real lock state after a lock or unlock command.

hideLocks.title: Hide locks
hideLocks.description: Optional hide list. Use lock alias, lock ID, lock name or MAC address. Separate multiple values with commas, semicolons or line breaks.
